layout.banner: Sign up and get 20% off to your first order.

hero.description: Discover premium products at competitive prices, with fast shipping and exceptional customer service.

categories.title: Shop by Category
categories.description: Find the perfect device for your needs from our curated collections

home.featuredProductsDescription: We offer the best shopping experience with premium features

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.description: We offer the best shopping experience with premium features

freeShipping.title: Free Shipping
freeShipping.description: Free shipping on all orders over $50. Fast and reliable delivery to your doorstep.

secureCheckout.title: Secure Checkout
secureCheckout.description: Your payment information is always safe and secure with us. We use industry-leading encryption.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our customer support team is always available to help with any questions or concerns.

qualityGuarantee.title: Quality Guarantee
qualityGuarantee.description: We stand behind the quality of every product we sell. 30-day money-back guarantee.

testimonials.one: One of the best purchases. Great, easy and safe to use.
testimonials.two: Simply a very elegant piece of hardware, with a gorgeous UI in the app.
testimonials.three: Delivery was awesome. One day. Payment was simple. Product is perfect and safe.
testimonials.four: Setup was quick, and everything works flawlessly. Highly recommend!

footer.description: Your one-stop shop for everything tech. Premium products at competitive prices.

dialog.title: Write a review
dialog.description: Please rate your experience and share any additional feedback.

productPage.noReviewsDescription: Customers who have purchased this product have not yet submitted any reviews.

about.title: What is {{name}}?
about.communityText: {{name}} is a global online marketplace, where people come together to make, sell, buy, and collect unique items. We're also a community pushing for positive change for small businesses, people, and the planet. Here are some of the ways we're making a positive impact, together.
about.creatorsText: There's no {{name}} warehouse, just millions of people selling the things they love. We make the whole process easy, helping you connect directly with makers to find something extraordinary.
about.peaceText: Your privacy is the highest priority of our dedicated team. And if you ever need assistance, we are always ready to step in for support.
about.question: Have a question? Contact us here.

signinPage.title: Login to your account
signinPage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

signupPage.title: Create an account
signupPage.description: Enter your information below to create your account
signupPage.emailHelp: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
signupPage.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters long.

empty.title: Nothing here... yet.
empty.description: Add items to your cart to see them here when you're ready to check out.

favoritesPage.title: Your Favorites
favoritesPage.emptyDescription: Start favoriting items to compare, shop, and keep track of things you love.

storeProductsPage.title: Your Products
storeProductsPage.emptyDescription: Get started by creating your first product.

table.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the product data from our servers.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question?
contactPage.description: Email us and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. Monday-Saturday
contactPage.descriptionFollowup: Please fill the form below to contact us and we will get back to you as soon as possible. We're happy to answer questions or help.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.subject: Subject

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.sameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as the current password
validation.maxPriceGteMinPrice: Max price must be greater than min price

personalInfo.title: Personal information
personalInfo.description: Manage your personal details and how your profile appears. Enter your information below.
personalInfo.photoRequirements: Must be a .jpg, or .png file smaller than 4MB.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
changePassword.newPasswordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters long.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: No longer want to use our service? You can delete your account here. This action is not reversible. All information related to this account will be deleted permanently.

alert.title: Are you absolutely sure?
alert.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset your password
forgotPasswordPage.description: Enter the email you use for {{name}} so we can send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPasswordPage.toastTitle: Check your email for next steps
forgotPasswordPage.toastDescription: To reset your password, use the link in the email we sent to {{email}}.

resetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
resetPasswordPage.description: Choose a new password below and confirm it. Use the secure link from your email if you opened this page from a reset message.
resetPasswordPage.successToast: Your password has been reset. You can sign in with your new password.
